---
title: "Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) Data"
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


---
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{hypometrics: Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) Data}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

<style>
.nobullet li{
  list-style-type: none;
}
</style>

![](hypo_logo.png)

## Introduction

The `hypometrics` package was developed to manipulate data from CGM devices manufactured by Abbott, specifically the Abbott Freestyle Libre 2 sensor and reader. Future work will involve updating the package so it can function with data from additional CGM devices (e.g. Dexcom).

## Data Cleaning

## Data Checking

## Data Visualising

## Data Linking
